functions.name: takePicture
functions.behavior: Takes a picture and returns the file path of the captured image.

functions.name: startVideoRecording
functions.behavior: Starts recording a video.

functions.name: stopVideoRecording
functions.behavior: Stops video recording and returns the file path.

functions.name: initialize
functions.behavior: Initializes the camera with the given lens direction.

functions.name: dispose
functions.behavior: Releases camera resources.

functions.name: play
functions.behavior: Plays audio from the given URL or asset path.

functions.name: pause
functions.behavior: Pauses the currently playing audio.

functions.name: stop
functions.behavior: Stops the currently playing audio.

functions.name: setVolume
functions.behavior: Sets the volume level (0.0 to 1.0).

functions.name: getDuration
functions.behavior: Returns the duration of the current audio in milliseconds.

functions.name: getCurrentPosition
functions.returns: Promise<{ latitude: number; longitude: number; accuracy: number }>
functions.behavior: Returns the current GPS position.

functions.name: watchPosition
functions.behavior: Watches for position changes and calls callback. Returns an unsubscribe function.

functions.name: requestPermission
functions.behavior: Requests location permission from the user.

functions.name: getItem
functions.behavior: Retrieves a value by key from persistent storage.

functions.name: setItem
functions.behavior: Stores a value by key in persistent storage.

functions.name: removeItem
functions.behavior: Removes a value by key from persistent storage.

functions.name: clear
functions.behavior: Clears all values from persistent storage.

functions.name: show
functions.behavior: Shows a local notification with the given title and body.

functions.name: requestPermission
functions.behavior: Requests notification permission from the user.

functions.name: cancel
functions.behavior: Cancels a scheduled or active notification by ID.
